title: 🔥深度低估引发估值修复
body: 市场处于低估修复期。MVRV 为 1.36，数值低于历史上 68% 的时间，且对比 2022 年 5 月的 1.32 优势微弱。当前价格 76,069 美元距 200 日定投成本 86,103 美元仍有 11.7% 的负偏离。这意味着长期持筹者普遍处于浮亏状态，抛压枯竭。偏多。距离回归成本线还有多远？
body_en: The market is in a valuation recovery phase. MVRV sits at 1.36, lower than 68% of historical data, with only a slight edge over the 1.32 seen in May 2022. At $76,069, price remains 11.7% below the 200-day DCA cost basis of $86,103. This implies that long-term holders are largely underwater, leaving sell-side pressure exhausted. Leaning Bullish. How far until we reclaim the cost basis?
